name: p0-tavern-first-minute-playable-entry
title: P0 tavern first-minute playable entry
description: Make /tavern/:id first screen a playable doorway: how to play, host NPC, quick actions, then chat.
creator: lijin
notes: Implemented playable first-minute doorway for /tavern/:id: guide now derives hostRole/playObjective/startLabel/quickActions; workbench renders data-first-minute-play-entry with how-to-play, host NPC, three quick actions, and CTA. Quick actions only prefill composer and do not call /chat. Validation: npm --prefix .\frontend run build passed; npm --prefix .\frontend run typecheck passed; Playwright mocked /tavern/demo desktop+mobile passed with screenshots under artifacts/validation/p0-tavern-first-minute-playable-entry-2026-06-03.
